description: .NET version upgrade plan from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 10.0

tasks.reason: The user explicitly requested an upgrade to the latest LTS version. .NET Framework 4.8 is a legacy platform that receives only security fixes and does not support cross-platform deployment, modern ASP.NET Core features, or the latest performance improvements. Upgrading to .NET 10.0 LTS ensures long-term support through May 2028, access to modern APIs, improved performance, and alignment with the current Microsoft-supported .NET ecosystem.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade the ContosoUniversity project from .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET 10.0. This includes: (1) converting the legacy non-SDK-style .csproj to SDK-style format with PackageReference; (2) updating the target framework to net10.0; (3) migrating from ASP.NET MVC 5 (System.Web) to ASP.NET Core MVC, replacing Global.asax, Web.config, and App_Start with ASP.NET Core equivalents (Program.cs, middleware pipeline, appsettings.json); (4) upgrading all NuGet packages (Entity Framework Core, Microsoft.Extensions.*, etc.) to versions compatible with .NET 10; (5) fixing any API breaking changes introduced by the migration.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded ContosoUniversity to SDK-style ASP.NET Core on net10.0; replaced legacy startup/config with Program.cs and appsettings.json; migrated MVC controllers/views; updated EF Core packages; replaced MSMQ notification implementation with ASP.NET Core-compatible in-memory queue; build and tests passed in delegated validation.
